applied_optimizations.name: Fused Triton kernel for mul + LeakyReLU + GELU
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented fused Triton kernel that combines channel-wise multiplication, LeakyReLU, and exact GELU (using tl.math.erf) into a single kernel. Fixed previous issues: replaced tl.libdevice.tanh with tl.math.erf for exact GELU formula, used BLOCK_SIZE multiple of 64 for CDNA4 wavefront alignment, explicit float32 casts for loads/stores.

attempted_but_failed.name: GELU tanh approximation
attempted_but_failed.reason: Numerical precision mismatch with PyTorch exact GELU

notes: Convolution dominates execution time (79.6%). Further optimization would require fusing conv with elementwise ops or optimizing the conv kernel itself.
My fused kernel achieves 1.20x speedup over PyTorch reference by fusing mul + LeakyReLU + GELU.
Key fix: Use tl.math.erf for exact GELU formula (0.5 * x * (1 + erf(x/sqrt(2)))) instead of tanh approximation to match PyTorch default behavior within tolerance.
BLOCK_SIZE set to multiple of 64 for CDNA4 wavefront alignment on MI355X.
